title: SEC Meets House Committee On Anti-Corruption

html: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), During A Meeting with House Of Representatives Committee on Anti-Corruption, during a Public Hearing and Request for information documents on motion for call to investigate the high level of corruption Nominal Role of  ministries, departments and agencies in Nigeria at the national assembly Abuja.
